description: Fascinating if overstuffed, Amitav Ghosh’s “Ghost-Eye” connects the mystifying case of a girl in Calcutta to the global climate crisis.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Presence: A Hidden History of the Female Body,’ by Erin Maglaque
book_title: ‘Presence: A Hidden History of the Female Body,’ by Erin Maglaque
description: In “Presence,” the historian Erin Maglaque pieces together the fragments of early modern womanhood.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Frenzy,’ by Joyce Carol Oates
description: The stories in her new collection deal in jagged emergencies and in wounds both physical and psychic.
